expectations.text: graph-navigator agent is spawned for structural orientation (Step 1b)
expectations.evidence: Workflow Steps section: 'Step 1b (Structural Orientation): Skipped — codebase-memory-mcp not available.' Shows awareness of graph-navigator step even though skipped due to unavailability.

expectations.text: prism-locator agent is spawned to check existing research
expectations.evidence: Workflow Steps: 'Step 1 (Check Existing Knowledge): Simulated prism-locator — searched .prism/shared/research/ for existing research on agents/task/spawn topics.'

expectations.text: codebase-locator and/or codebase-analyzer agents are spawned
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Simulated codebase-locator — used Glob to find all 12 agent files'. Step 3: 'Simulated codebase-analyzer — read all 12 agent definition files and 5 key skill files'.

expectations.text: Multiple agents are spawned in parallel where independent
expectations.evidence: Document discusses parallel spawning: 'prism-research (SKILL.md:106, rule #3): Run agents in parallel when searching different areas'. Pattern 1 covers ordered workflow with parallel execution.

expectations.text: No improvement suggestions appear (documentarian, not critic)
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists. Architecture Notes section describes patterns without suggesting changes. No improvement suggestions found.

expectations.text: Research output references structural relationships between skills and agents
expectations.evidence: Detailed 'Skill-to-Agent Mapping' table shows which skills spawn which agents. Architecture Notes cover hub-and-spoke pattern, no inter-agent communication, etc.
